docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT WOLKIN JOSHUA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-12-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-28-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALDERON HUMBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLKIN JOSHUA $390.00 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $409.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SETTLED BET THE PARTIES AS FOLLOWS: DEFT WILL RESTORE THE CATALYCTIC CONVERTER SYSTEM OF PLFT'S VEH. WITH USED PART & PERFORM SMOG CHECKON THE VEH
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALDERON HUMBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOLKIN JOSHUA $398.66 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $418.45, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23705 ON 4-27-95. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WOLKIN JOSHUA
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-28-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-29-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $390.00 FILED BY CALDERON HUMBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT WOLKIN JOSHUA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
CERT MAIL TO WOLKIN JOSHUA RETURNED SIGNED.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23705, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
